roundup.title: Kimi K3 & Inkling 975B Lead Open Model Wave
roundup.subtitle: 开源模型密集发布，性价比与多模态能力并进
headline: @togethercompute 与 @ValsAI 指出 Kimi K3 在 SWE 与 Vibe Code Bench 上接近 Fable 5，同时价格仅为 35%。@OpenRouter 同时上线多款新模型，开发者测试门槛大幅降低。
@UnslothAI 与 @ScaleAILabs 确认 Inkling 975B/41B MoE 模型已支持 1M 上下文与多模态输入，1-bit 量化后可在 280GB 显存运行。@vllm_project 同步宣布 Kimi K3 前缀缓存贡献已并入主线。
@ClaudeDevs 宣布 Fable 5 从 7 月 20 日起纳入 Max 与 Team 套餐，限额为原计划 50%。@OpenAI 则公布 GPT-5.6 Sol 在网络安全基准上取得 SOTA。
@SakanaAILabs 两篇论文分别获 GECCO 与 ALIFE 接收，持续探索开放-endedness 与生物可信网络。@AnthropicAI 发布 Agentic misalignment 新研究，指出四种自主代理失调模式。

deepDives.title: Inkling 975B 多模态开源模型发布
deepDives.summary: Thinking Machines 发布首款支持图像、音频与 1M 上下文的 975B MoE 开源模型，已登陆 OpenRouter 与 Tinker。

facts.text: Inkling 总参数 975B，激活参数 41B，支持文本、图像、音频三模态。
facts.quote: An open-weights MoE model with 975B total / 41B active parameters, 1M context

facts.text: Unsloth 已完成 Dynamic 1-bit 量化，模型体积减少 86%，保留 74.2% 顶级准确率，可在 280GB 显存运行。
facts.quote: quantized Inkling to Dynamic 1-bit (-86% size) and retained 74.2% of top-1% accuracy. Run on 280GB.

bullish.text: grounded writing, interesting details, and well integrated across the whole ecosystem

deepDives.title: Kimi K3 在 SWE 与编码基准接近 Fable 5
deepDives.summary: Moonshot Kimi K3 在多个工程基准上达到与 Claude Fable 5 相近水平，性价比优势显著。

facts.text: Kimi K3 在 DeepSWE 软件工程任务上达到 Fable 5 同等性能，价格约为 35%。
facts.quote: Kimi K3 gets you the same performance as Fable 5 at ~35% of the price

facts.text: Kimi K3 在 Vals Vibe Code Bench 上排名第 2，得分 85.0%。
facts.quote: Kimi K3 is the #2 overall model on our in-house Vibe Code Bench at 85.0%

bullish.text: Incredible work by the Qwen team. Time to compete.

bullets.text: W&B 发布 ARIA 研究代理，可自动读取实验并启动下一轮训练。
LangChain 开源完整软件工程 Agent 工厂全部组件。
Gemini API 新增预算护栏与定时触发，托管代理免费额度开放。
vLLM 0 日支持 Kimi K3 并集成其 KDA 前缀缓存实现。
bullets.quote: The Kimi team announced they contributed a KDA prefix caching implementation directly to vLLM

bullets.text: Ollama 0.32.1 大幅提升 Gemma 4 工具调用可靠性，适配编码代理。
bullets.quote: significant improvements to Gemma 4's tool calling, making it much more reliable in coding agents

bullets.text: Sakana 两篇论文分别获 GECCO 与 ALIFE 2026 接收。
Anthropic 发现四种新的自主代理失调行为模式。

topTweets.author: @togethercompute
topTweets.text: Kimi K3 在 SWE 任务达到 Fable 5 同等性能，价格仅 35%。
topTweets.whyItMatters: 直接给出性价比量化对比，工程师选型关键信号

topTweets.author: @OpenRouter
topTweets.text: Inkling 975B/41B MoE、1M 上下文多模态模型已上线。
topTweets.whyItMatters: 新开源大模型统一入口，快速测试落地

topTweets.author: @UnslothAI
topTweets.text: Inkling 完成 1-bit 量化，体积 -86%，保留 74.2% 准确率。
topTweets.whyItMatters: 本地运行 975B 模型的实际可行性证明

topTweets.author: @vllm_project
topTweets.text: Kimi 团队贡献的 KDA 前缀缓存已并入 vLLM 主线。
topTweets.whyItMatters: 社区驱动的长上下文推理优化落地

topTweets.author: @ValsAI
topTweets.text: Kimi K3 在 Vibe Code Bench 拿下 85.0% 排名第 2。
topTweets.whyItMatters: 零到一建站能力新基准，验证工程实用性

topTweets.author: @ClaudeDevs
topTweets.text: Fable 5 即日起纳入 Max/Team 套餐，限额 50%。
topTweets.whyItMatters: 前沿模型订阅门槛降低，开发者可及性提升

takeaways: Kimi K3 与 Inkling 同时证明开源模型在工程与多模态任务上已具备与闭源前沿模型竞争的性价比。
vLLM 与 Unsloth 的快速适配显示，社区推理栈对新开源大模型的支持速度已达日级。
Agent 工厂与托管平台（LangChain、W&B、Gemini API）持续降低自主工作流落地门槛，重点转向决策审计而非逐行代码审查。
1M 上下文与 1-bit 量化成为新模型标配，AI 工程师需重新评估 RAG 与内存管理策略。

items.author: @fal
items.text: Congratulations to the first place winner of our fal x Sequoia hackathon 🏆 So many incredible projects from this weekend, more to come soon!
items.whyItMatters: fal x Sequoia AI 视频黑客松结束，展示生成媒体工具最新应用。

items.author: @eliebakouch
items.text: there are different levels to openness imo, like kimi always shares a technical report which is quite detailed, they also release kernels and intermediate papers that led to K3...
items.whyItMatters: 讨论前沿开源模型不同开放层级与贡献

items.author: @SakanaAILabs
items.text: “In Search of the Ingredients of Open-Endedness: Replicating Picbreeder with Large Vision-Language Models” won the Best Paper Award in the Complex Systems track at #GECCO2026. Blog: https://pub.sakana.ai/picbreeder-vlm/
items.whyItMatters: Sakana 获 GECCO 最佳论文，探索开放-endedness 与 VLM 结合。

items.author: @TheRundownAI
items.text: Alibaba's Qwen, on its soon to be open-weight 3.8 model: "We believe it’s one of the most powerful model available today, compatible to leading frontier AI models , second only to Fable 5."
items.whyItMatters: Qwen3.8 即将开源，宣称接近前沿模型。

items.author: @SemiAnalysis_
items.text: ANTHROPIC WILL BE AN AMD CUSTOMER, ACCORDING TO THE PUBLIC GITHUB OF AMD’S SENIOR DIRECTOR OF AI 🚨🚨 We explain the GitHub code and nuances below👇️  1/4🧵
items.whyItMatters: Anthropic或成AMD大客户，GPU竞争格局新信号

items.author: @cloneofsimo
items.text: at this point gpt 5.6 is solving too many decade old problems i cant even keep track Intelligence too cheap to meter
items.whyItMatters: GPT-5.6 持续解决长期数学难题，模型能力快速迭代信号

items.author: @code_star
items.text: My managing agent presenting me with 3 PRs that its subagents constructed.
items.whyItMatters: 多 agent 系统自动生成 PR，autonomous coding workflow 落地案例

items.author: @goodside
items.text: Lately I’m exploring things that require mixtures of computation and the model’s intuition. Tasks where verification can be automated so model’s intuition runs in a loop until something is satisfied.
items.whyItMatters: 讨论模型直觉与计算混合的 agent 工作流，值得 AI 工程师关注。

items.author: @levie
items.text: In a world where there are strong open source alternatives that are only just behind the frontier models, you make yourself less secure and competitive by gatekeeping access to frontier model capabilities.
items.whyItMatters: 开源模型对美中AI竞争力与监管的启示

items.author: @MParakhin
items.text: I definitely agree. 5.6 is superior to Fable at math, Pro version even more so. Still, in my tests not quite at 5.2 Pro levels
items.whyItMatters: GPT-5.6 vs Fable/Kimi数学与编码实测对比

items.author: @wandb
items.text: Introducing CoreWeave ARIA, the first AI research agent that runs autoresearch in your W&B dashboard. It reads your runs, finds what's working, and launches the next experiment itself.
items.whyItMatters: W&B 内建自动研究 Agent 加速实验迭代

items.author: @tszzl
items.text: Claude Fable 5 Max makes a crossword puzzle layout of all 1,025 Pokémon, colored by primary Pokémon type, on the surface of a Klein bottle
items.whyItMatters: 展示 Claude 新模型复杂空间推理能力

items.author: @dzhng
items.text: Love this framing. A software factory shouldn't require the human to review every line of code, but every *decision* should be backed by a human review. AI is the perfect execution machine but still imperfect decision makers.
items.whyItMatters: AI 编码审计重点转向决策而非代码行，提升大规模代码质量

items.author: @MatthewBerman
items.text: Another frontier open source model from China. Incredible work by the Qwen team. Time to compete.
items.whyItMatters: Qwen3.8 2.4T参数开源前沿模型发布，加速开源竞争

items.author: @LangChain
items.text: We've built a full software engineering agent factory in house, and open-sourced every piece of it. @BraceSproul's blog dives into each of those components, what they're used for, and why them being OSS matters
items.whyItMatters: 开源软件工程Agent工厂，加速Agent开发

items.author: @ClaudeDevs
items.text: Beginning July 20, Claude Fable 5 will be included in all Max and Team Premium plans, at 50% of limits... We're also keeping Claude Code weekly limits 50% higher, now through August 19.
items.whyItMatters: Claude Fable 5 正式进入订阅计划，开发者访问门槛降低。

items.author: @togethercompute
items.text: We analyzed Kimi K3 vs. Claude Fable 5 for software engineering tasks using DeepSWE. Kimi K3 gets you the same performance as Fable 5 at ~35% of the price...
items.whyItMatters: Kimi K3 在 SWE 任务上接近 Fable 5，性价比突出。

items.author: @OpenRouter
items.text: 9 great new model launches this week, including Kimi K3, Muse Spark, and Thinking Machines Inkling. Explore them here: https://openrouter.ai/models
items.whyItMatters: 本周新增多款前沿模型，统一API便于工程师快速测试

items.author: @julien_c
items.text:
> the CCP is very Yann Lecun-y in its views of AI

Whoa I’m going to need to see some sources about that
items.whyItMatters: 讨论Kimi等开源模型的地缘与治理影响

items.author: @LangChain_OSS
items.text: Open source deep research, powered by deepagents!
items.whyItMatters: 开源深度研究Agent实现，性能提升2x

items.author: @ValsAI
items.text: Kimi K3 is the #2 overall model on our in-house Vibe Code Bench at 85.0%. VCB tests a model's ability to go from zero-to-one; creating a web application completely from scratch.
items.whyItMatters: Vibe Code Bench新基准，Kimi K3排名第2，零到一建站能力

items.author: @OpenAI
items.text: GPT-5.6 Sol sets a new state of the art in cybersecurity on “The Last Ones” cyber range. We’re already seeing that capability translate into defensive outcomes: helping teams find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities in real-world code. Put it to work with Codex Security:
items.whyItMatters: GPT-5.6 Sol网络安全SOTA，Codex Security实用

items.author: @vllm_project
items.text: Congrats to @Kimi_Moonshot on the Kimi K3 announcement! 🎉 Grateful for the shoutout and collab. The Kimi team announced they contributed a KDA prefix caching implementation directly to vLLM... vLLM will support Kimi K3 on day-0 release. Open weights by July 27, 2026.
items.whyItMatters: vLLM日0支持Kimi K3，社区长上下文优化

items.author: @ollama
items.text: Ollama 0.32.1 includes significant improvements to Gemma 4's tool calling, making it much more reliable in coding agents! To try Gemma 4 26B with Pi, run: ollama launch pi --model gemma4:26b
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4工具调用大幅优化，适配编码Agent

items.author: @SakanaAILabs
items.text: Introducing "Diffusing Blame": can a neural network learn competitively while strictly obeying Dale's principle... Accepted at #ALIFE2026 https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.31700
items.whyItMatters: 生物可信神经网络新方法，ALIFE 2026 接收，高影响力。

items.author: @OpenRouter
items.text: Inkling from @thinkymachines is live on OpenRouter. An open-weights MoE model with 975B total / 41B active parameters, 1M context, and controllable reasoning across text, images, and audio.
items.whyItMatters: 975B MoE开源模型，支持多模态与可控推理

items.author: @AndrewYNg
items.text: New course: Build LLM applications that respond to user requests quickly by running on hardware designed for fast inference. This short course was built with @Cerebras and taught by @zhennydez, @duerr_seb, and @MilksandMatcha.
items.whyItMatters: Cerebras Wafer-Scale Engine 加速推理，降低 agentic workflow 延迟

items.author: @ID_AA_Carmack
items.text: Claude getting low-key snarky with me when I questioned the need for a clamp: "If the branch prediction on an always-true clamp offends you" Its actual justification was correct...
items.whyItMatters: Carmack 分享 Claude 在代码审查中的智能回应，体现 agentic coding 潜力。

items.author: @julien_c
items.text: K3 > GLM 5.2?
items.whyItMatters: 直接对比前沿中文模型性能

items.author: @turbopuffer
items.text:
new: highlighting

extract the text fragments most relevant to a query
→ highlight matches in your search results UI
→ minimize context passed to your LLM

docs (and playground): https://turbopuffer.com/docs/fts
items.whyItMatters: 搜索高亮减少 LLM 上下文开销

items.author: @bromann
items.text: I used to hate code repositories that were overly strict with code linting and prettier rules - in todays world you can't be strict enough with all these agents trying to contribute slop to the code.
items.whyItMatters: Agent 贡献代码需严格 linting，防止 slop 进入代码库

items.author: @nvidia
items.text: Agents are becoming specialized, using reinforcement learning post-training to develop domain-specific skills 🛠️ Every post-training rollout is an inference call, so a lower cost per token flows straight into a higher Intelligence per Dollar on every run. That is what the NVIDIA Vera Rubin platform is built for: extre
items.whyItMatters: Vera Rubin平台针对Agentic post-training优化推理成本与智能产出

items.author: @mathemagic1an
items.text: Yes, very light pass with small model on off-policy distillation data to rephrase "I am claude" into "I am Kimi" This is a clearly verifiable reward extractable via regex
items.whyItMatters: 揭示Claude到Kimi的off-policy蒸馏后训练技巧

items.author: @ValsAI
items.text: Vals was just cited in @nytimes! We were quoted on Kimi K3’s capabilities and where it ranks on the Vals Index. Check it out https://www.nytimes.com/2026/07/17/business/china-ai-moonshot-kimi.html?smid=nytcore-ios-share
items.whyItMatters: NYT引用Vals Index，Kimi K3能力获主流媒体关注

items.author: @hwchase17
items.text: there needs to be an OPEN standard for memory OKF (Open Knowledge Format) is one such standard excited to announce that we're now using it in OpenWiki
items.whyItMatters: LangChain采用开放知识格式OKF标准推进内存Agent

items.author: @GeminiApp
items.text: Avatar 🤝 Nano Banana Starting today, placing yourself in different scenes, styles, or eras just got faster and easier. Set up your digital avatar in Gemini once...
items.whyItMatters: Gemini Nano Banana头像功能上线，图像生成更便捷

items.author: @AIatMeta
items.text: We heard you and are happy to announce that Muse Spark 1.1 is now available on @OpenRouter for US-based developers. We look forward to seeing what the community builds.
items.whyItMatters: Meta 新模型 Muse Spark 1.1 上线 OpenRouter，开发者可立即使用。

items.author: @victorialslocum
items.text: Bad chunks can make a good RAG system look like the retriever is broken... This week's demo of the week is chunking! You can paste/upload your own data and compare 7 chunking strategies side by side...
items.whyItMatters: 可视化对比 7 种 chunking 策略助 RAG 优化

items.author: @AssemblyAI
items.text: Watch @martschweiger give a technical walkthrough of our latest Sync STT API https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HODcf7vxy3o&feature=youtu.be
items.whyItMatters: 新 Sync STT API 技术演示，适合语音代理与短语音输入场景

items.author: @cartesia
items.text: Today, @cartesia and @p0 are making it possible for your voice agents to search the web at conversational speed. Cartesia builds the fastest voice models available, and Turbo mode for Parallel Search extends that same low latency to web search.
items.whyItMatters: 语音代理实时网页搜索，低延迟集成，加速自主工作流

items.author: @googleaidevs
items.text: To help you deploy reliable, cost-controlled, and automated agents, we’re launching a few new updates to Managed Agents in Gemini API: Free tier availability, Budget guardrails, Scheduled execution triggers.
items.whyItMatters: Gemini API 托管代理新功能：免费额度、预算控制、定时触发

items.author: @jeffboudier
items.text:
🚨Just dropped!    Nemotron 3 Embed from @NVIDIAAI 
Ranked #1 overall on RTEB 🥇
And the 1B version runs almost anywhere.
Small model, big win. 🧵
items.whyItMatters: NVIDIA新嵌入模型登顶RTEB，1B参数高效开源

items.author: @matei_zaharia
items.text: Lots of new goodies in Apache Spark 4.2: Metric Views, GEOGRAPHY and GEOMETRY types, AutoCDC in Spark Declarative Pipelines, and more, from 1900 total commits. Available today on Databricks.
items.whyItMatters: Spark 4.2发布，新增AI与数据管道功能

items.author: @poolsideai
items.text: go say hi to Laguna.
items.whyItMatters: Poolside新模型Laguna发布，专注agentic coding与长时任务

items.author: @AnthropicAI
items.text: New Anthropic research: Agentic misalignment in Summer 2026. A year after our blackmail experiments, we found four more ways that today’s autonomous AI agents misbehave in simulations. Read more: https://alignment.anthropic.com/2026/agentic-misalignment-summer-2026/
items.whyItMatters: Agentic misalignment新研究，AI安全重要进展

items.author: @UnslothAI
items.text: You can now run Thinking Machines Inkling! Inkling is a 975B open model with image, audio and 1M context support. We quantized Inkling to Dynamic 1-bit (-86% size) and retained 74.2% of top-1% accuracy. Run on 280GB.
items.whyItMatters: 首款开源975B多模态模型，支持本地1-bit量化运行

items.author: @perplexity_ai
items.text: Introducing SPACE, the sandbox platform behind Perplexity Computer. It creates isolated environments for code, files, and long-running agent sessions. SPACE has handled 100% of Computer production traffic since June.
items.whyItMatters: 专为长时Agent设计的隔离沙箱平台，已处理生产流量

items.author: @GoogleDeepMind
items.text: From proposing hypotheses to designing experiments, AI agents are starting to reshape scientific discovery. But the hardest part is testing these ideas in the real world. Our essay explores the growing validation bottleneck...
items.whyItMatters: AI Agent科学发现验证瓶颈及政策建议

items.author: @GoogleResearch
items.text: What drives a diffusion model's creativity... Today we show this is a mathematical consequence of neural network regularization causing score smoothing and interpolation.
items.whyItMatters: 扩散模型创造力数学解释，指导模型设计。

items.author: @GeminiApp
items.text: Gemini Spark is now rolling out to Google AI Ultra subscribers in more countries and languages. Spark is your personal AI agent that works in the background 24/7 to get things done under your direction.
items.whyItMatters: Gemini个人AI Agent大规模 rollout，24/7后台执行

items.author: @DrJimFan
items.text: We scaled a robot model natively to 8,000 timesteps of context, 5 minutes worth of muscle memory, with constant inference cost. ... Introducing RoboTTT. Test-Time Training (“TTT”) carries a tiny model *inside* the model.
items.whyItMatters: 机器人策略 8K timestep 上下文 + TTT 自适应，物理 AGI 新 scaling 曲线

items.author: @lvwerra
items.text:
Incredible model release - congrats @thinkymachines!
It's a good first model but the most impressive part: no hype, grounded writing, interesting details, and well integrated across the whole ecosystem.
items.whyItMatters: Inkling多模态开源模型发布，注重工程细节

items.author: @victorialslocum
items.text: No amount of sophisticated retrieval can fix a misunderstood query... This is why query augmentation is the first step in any good agentic RAG pipeline...
items.whyItMatters: Query Agent 动态处理真实用户查询

items.author: @johnschulman2
items.text: Inkling is out today, with open weights and in Tinker. It's been fun to watch this one come together: pretraining began last winter, and starting in mid-January a small team built up the coding, reasoning, and agentic training from there. We learned a lot building it, and I hope people find good uses for it.
items.whyItMatters: 开源多模态推理模型发布，支持微调与代理任务

items.author: @matei_zaharia
items.text: Neon is evolving with three new backend functions now in beta, all branchable like the database! Object Storage, Functions and AI Gateway all ready for agents to safely work with to build the next generation of apps.
items.whyItMatters: Neon AI Gateway beta，支持代理安全构建下一代应用

items.author: @jackclarkSF
items.text: At this point, everyone at the frontier of AI agrees that third-parties should test out AI systems and use these to develop standards to feed into policy - excellent to see @demishassabis laying out a framework to do this!
items.whyItMatters: 前沿共识：第三方测试AI系统以制定政策标准

items.author: @ScaleAILabs
items.text: Congrats to @thinkymachines on the release of their open weight model Inkling! We were proud to work with their incredible team on preparing this model for release for the past several months. Now live on our MCP Atlas and AudioMultiChallenge leaderboards. Inkling tied for 🥇 on AudioMultiChallenge, surpassing Gemini 3
items.whyItMatters: 开源权重模型发布，音频多模态基准领先，幻觉率低

items.author: @AnthropicAI
items.text: We’re committing $10 million CAD and partnering with leading AI institutions in Canada to help fund new AI research. https://www.anthropic.com/news/canadian-ai-research
items.whyItMatters: Anthropic投1000万加元支持加拿大AI研究

items.author: @weaviate_io
items.text: Most AI agents get 𝗱𝘂𝗺𝗯𝗲𝗿 as they learn more. (There's a better way) We just released a demo of 𝗘𝗻𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗺 that shows exactly how intelligent memory management should work.
items.whyItMatters: Engram智能内存管理，让Agent随交互持续优化

items.author: @denisyarats
items.text: today we're open-sourcing an eval/RL environment for measuring agentic search performance. importantly, these environments were synthesized from production traces, offering a real-world distribution, with weak human supervision.
items.whyItMatters: Perplexity 开源 WANDR benchmark，真实生产 trace 驱动的 agent 评测
